sections.title: A: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
I found an old calculator by chance in the cupboard. **across**
I ...... an old calculator in the cupboard.

Tablets and laptops are not exactly the same. **difference**
There ...... tablets and laptops.

Inventors should never invent false information. **made**
False information should never ...... inventors.

Don't put those old batteries in the bin – recycle them! **away**
Don't ...... – recycle them!

The printer stopped working during the lesson, so we used another one. **down**
We used another printer when ours ...... during the lesson.

The scientist's discovery caused a change in medical research. **resulted**
The scientist's ...... a change in medical research.

There are several gadgets that I would like to test. **number**
There are ...... gadgets that I would like to test.

Make sure you put clean water in the tank before turning on the machine. **full**
Make sure the tank ...... clean water before turning on the machine.

sections.title: B: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: Please turn the computer ...... before you leave the classroom.
...... my opinion, this gadget is too complicated.
Disconnect the charger ...... the tablet when the battery is full.
We had three possible answers, but ...... the end only one was correct.
...... last, the scientists discovered what had caused the problem.
How many types ...... software have you used this year?
It's getting cold, so I'll turn ...... the heater.
There must be a reason ...... the sudden decrease in speed.

sections.title: C: Word formation
sections.instructions: Complete by changing the form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: The ...... (LONG) of the bridge is over two kilometres.
The lecture about artificial intelligence was really ...... (FASCINATE).
The two robots moved almost ...... (IDENTICAL).
The researchers reached a surprising ...... (CONCLUDE).
This is the inventor ...... created the first version of the device.
The museum ...... we visited yesterday has a robotics exhibition.
She is the scientist ...... research changed the project.
I'll show you everything ...... I found about the new invention.
He is the engineer ...... I spoke to at the laboratory.
That is the program ...... solved the problem.
Is this ...... charger or Sara's?
The invention was ......, so she presented it at the science fair.
The workshop is the place ...... students build their robots.
They designed a machine ...... can clean the floor automatically.

sections.title: E: Complete the sentences
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: The university is carrying ...... research into artificial intelligence.
The invention of the smartphone had a huge ...... on daily life.
Maya came ...... with a clever idea for saving water.
The test failed the first time, so they tried it ...... .
He worked ...... how to repair the old radio.
Researchers ...... a new material that is lighter than plastic.
The students were amazed ...... the results of the experiment.
They decided to ...... for a patent before selling the gadget.
This technology makes it possible ...... send messages instantly.
She is responsible ...... programming the robot.
The device ...... to be very useful in hospitals.
The inventors set ...... a small company to produce the machine.
